head.lede: Two projects we're actively building, plus a sample of past client work. Twenty years' worth of code doesn't fit on one page — what's here is what we think is most relevant to the work we're focused on now.

active.label: 01 · Currently building
active.title: In active development.
active.lede: Internal projects we use to inform how we work — and one product we plan to ship.

items.title: Foreman Run
items.description: An AI-agent harness with remote control. Custom workflows orchestrate work through an AI coding agent running locally or in a sandbox. We use it daily — it's part of why we can ship custom applications faster than firms our size usually can.

items.title: Down Bad
items.description: 24/7 uptime monitoring with more features than the established tools, at a flat $50 a year — not per monitor, not per site. Built because we wanted better monitoring for our own infrastructure than the market was offering.

past.label: 02 · Selected past work
past.title: Client engagements.
past.lede: A sample of what we've built for businesses over the years. Some are anonymized; in most cases the work was internal and not public-facing.

cta.sub: Tell us about it. A 30-minute call, no pitch, no pressure.
